[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A group of people appear to be crowded together in a vehicle or on a platform, shown through a video or screen capture with a circular close-up on the left.

Main Subject:
Several people are visible in the center and right of the image, with one person on the left foreground shown in a circular inset facing toward the right. The left-side inset shows a person’s face in profile, while the main group on the right includes multiple individuals standing close together, some with dark clothing and head coverings, and one person appears to hold or be near equipment or a bag.

Setting:
The scene looks like an indoor or vehicle interior or platform area based on the enclosed surroundings and the presence of a screen-like overlay. Lighting is bright in the right portion, while the left circular inset is darker with a strong contrast against the background.

Visual Details:
The image has a low-resolution, slightly blurred look consistent with a captured display. The left side features a large circular frame containing a close-up of a person’s face, outlined by dark edges. Across the rest of the frame, people cluster together in front of a patterned background with red, white, and gray shapes and lines. In the bottom-right area, a red-and-white diagonal striped object or panel is visible, and there are cables or straps and dark items near the group. The camera angle is slightly elevated and tilted, as if viewing the scene on a screen.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a crowded group of people in a confined setting, with a circular inset close-up of another person on the left. The background includes bold red and white geometric patterns, and multiple people stand close together near dark equipment or bags.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
